query:
UPDATE stt_scores s
JOIN (
  SELECT territoryId, MAX(period) as maxPeriod
  FROM stt_scores
  GROUP BY territoryId
) latest ON s.territoryId = latest.territoryId AND s.period = latest.maxPeriod
SET s.published = 1, s.publishedAt = NOW()
WHERE s.published = 0;
